name: Radial — Research Impact Dimensions
input: Create a radial diagram showing the dimensions of research impact centered on 'Research Output'. Spokes: Publications (h-index, citations), Funding (grants awarded), Collaboration (co-authors network), Training (PhD students mentored), Translation (patents, clinical guidelines), Public Engagement (media coverage, policy briefs).
qualityCriteria: Items present (Publications, Funding, Collaboration, Training, Translation, Public Engagement)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
Central node with spokes radiating outward
napkinBenchmark: Central circle labeled 'Research Output' with 6 spokes connecting to satellite nodes. Each spoke labeled with a dimension and its metrics.

data.title: Research Impact Dimensions

items.label: Publications
items.description: h-index, citation counts, journal impact factors

items.label: Funding
items.description: Grants awarded, total funding secured, success rates

items.label: Training
items.description: PhD students mentored, postdocs supervised, courses taught

items.label: Translation
items.description: Patents filed, clinical guidelines influenced, spin-off companies

items.label: Public Engagement
items.description: Media coverage, policy briefs, community outreach events

data.caption: Six dimensions of research impact centered on research output
